title: relay: no timeout on auth handshake; pre-auth connections never reaped
description: relay/src/ws.rs line 157: stream.next().await has no timeout. Attacker opens many WebSocket connections, receives challenge, never sends authenticate. Each dangling connection holds a tokio task and OS socket. Keepalive only starts post-auth so these are never reaped. Fix: tokio::time::timeout around the authenticate receive, e.g. 10s.
